pageContext.name: Anya Forger
pageContext.description: Sideshow and the FuRyu Corporation present the Anya Forger Figure.  From the hit anime Spy x Family comes a new F:Nex figure of Anya Forger in her Eden school uniform!  Anya poses brilliantly on the cobblestone base with her stuffed chimera and a toy gun in her hand! The uniform is a luxurious design with gold decorations on black.  Anya has been carefully recreated down to the last detail, from her hair ornaments to her socks and shoes.
